subject: Research & verify facts for Commandcode.ai content
description:
Research key facts for all 4 assets:
1. IT service giants revenue/employee data (Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro)
2. AI code review speed statistics
3. Developer productivity numbers (lines of code per hour)
4. Jack Dorsey/Square layoff verification
5. Anthropic founder quotes on Indian IT

Use web search for ground truth. Save findings to memory.
